nasb.text: Then the sons of Israel went and did so; just as the Lord had commanded Moses and Aaron, so they did.

esv.text: Then the people of Israel went and did so; as the Lord had commanded Moses and Aaron, so they did.

cnv.text: 以色列人就去行了；耶和華怎樣吩咐摩西和亞倫，以色列人就照樣行了。

ccb.text: 耶和华怎么吩咐摩西和亚伦，以色列人就照样遵行。
